description:
A GitHub Desktop fork with advanced functionality and Bitbucket, GitLab integration.

An up-to-date fork of GitHub Desktop with additional features including multiple account support, Bitbucket and GitLab integration, commit search, multiple stashes per branch, and more.
Upstream: GitHub Desktop 3.5.11 release notes
Note
This release does not include any user-facing changes, since the upstream release was a patch to fix a bug that was already fixed in our fork.
This release simply removes our fork-specific patch in favor of the upstream fix.
